DECLARATION DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 71394237) FILED BY DEFENDANT GALIMBA, RODRIGO G. GALIMBA, MILAGROS S.

HEARING NOT HELD - TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-30-2023 IN 220, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TAX AND STRIKE DEFENDANT'S COSTS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT ISSUES THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE ORDER: 1)FILING FEES: GRANT AND STRIKE $225 AS THE DEFENDANTS WERE UNIFIED IN INTEREST AND MULTIPLE ANSWERS WERE NOT NECESSARY. ($225 ALLOWED) 2)JURY FEES: DENIED: THESE FEES ARE ALLOWABLE UNDER CCP SECTION 1033.5(A)(1). ($150.00 ALLOWED) 3)DEPOSITION COSTS: DENIED. THE DEPOSITION COSTS FOR THE PLAINTIFF ARE REASONABLY NECESSARY. ($427.40 ALLOWED) 4)SERVICE OF PROCESS: GRANT. THERE IS NOT SUFFICIENT SHOWING THIS AMOUNT IS REASONABLE OR REASONABLY NECESSARY. 5)PHOTOCOPIES OF EXHIBITS: GRANT. THERE IS NOT A SUFFICIENT SHOWING THIS EXPENSE WAS REASONABLY NECESSARY. 6)ELECTRONIC FILING/ SERVICE: DENIED. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES FOUR E-FILINGS WERE NECESSARY. IN ADDITION, DEFENDANT SUSTAINED THEIR BURDEN OF PROOF AS TO THE MOTIONS IN LIMINE. ($123.00 ALLOWED). THUS, THE COURT WILL AWARD: $ 925.40. MS. ORDONEZ TO PREPARE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW AND SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HONORABLE KATHLEEN KELLY; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED.
ORDER RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO TAX AND STRIKE DEFENDANT'S COSTS

Motion To Increase Claim Of Damages Above $10,000 And Pay Additional Court Fees
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mark Carton, Esq, 415-567-5517 for Plaintiff.
Virdinia Ordonez, Esq. 510-457-3440 Stratman & Williams Abrego for Defendant Rodrigo Galimba et al.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court orders Ms. Ordonez to re-send a proposed order to the contest email of Dept. 302. Mr. Carton argues. Ms. Ordonez responds. The Court raises issues re: trial date. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHANGFENG DING's Motion To Increase Claim Of Damages Above $10,000 And Pay Additional Court Fees.

Taken Under Submission. Ms. Ordonez to email a proposed form of order to Contestdept302tr@sftc.org.***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying PLaintiff's motion to increase filing fees.***

TDN SWEEP
